item.title: Flamethrower Combat on Iwo Jima
item.description: A WWII Marine reflects on flamethrower combat during the Battle of Iwo Jima, offering a firsthand look at service and survival in the Pacific.

media:content.media:title: Flamethrower Combat on Iwo Jima
media:content.media:description: A WWII Marine reflects on flamethrower combat during the Battle of Iwo Jima, offering a firsthand look at service and survival in the Pacific.

item.title: Remembering Colonel Bruce Crandall's Legacy
item.description: A tribute to Medal of Honor recipient Colonel Bruce Crandall, Army aviator and Vietnam War hero, whose courage at Ia Drang saved lives and inspired generations.

media:content.media:title: Remembering Colonel Bruce Crandall's Legacy
media:content.media:description: A tribute to Medal of Honor recipient Colonel Bruce Crandall, Army aviator and Vietnam War hero, whose courage at Ia Drang saved lives and inspired generations.

item.title: Reported Killed in Action: A Soldier's Story
item.description: A soldier reflects on being reported killed in action, sharing a firsthand wartime experience of survival, service, and the uncertainty of combat.

media:content.media:title: Reported Killed in Action: A Soldier's Story
media:content.media:description: A soldier reflects on being reported killed in action, sharing a firsthand wartime experience of survival, service, and the uncertainty of combat.

item.title: D-Day Ranger David Raaen Recalls Omaha Beach
item.description: General David E. Raaen, one of the last surviving D-Day Ranger officers, reflects on Omaha Beach, the Normandy campaign, and the fight across France.

media:content.media:title: D-Day Ranger David Raaen Recalls Omaha Beach
media:content.media:description: General David E. Raaen, one of the last surviving D-Day Ranger officers, reflects on Omaha Beach, the Normandy campaign, and the fight across France.

item.title: A Medal of Honor Story of Courage
item.description: A soldier’s Medal of Honor story of courage and survival, told through a wartime account of leadership under pressure.

media:content.media:title: A Medal of Honor Story of Courage
media:content.media:description: A soldier’s Medal of Honor story of courage and survival, told through a wartime account of leadership under pressure.

item.title: WWII Veterans Recall Combat Experience
item.description: World War II veterans reflect on what combat felt like, sharing firsthand memories of service, survival, and the realities of war.

media:content.media:title: WWII Veterans Recall Combat Experience
media:content.media:description: World War II veterans reflect on what combat felt like, sharing firsthand memories of service, survival, and the realities of war.

item.title: Rudy Meekins and a Korean War Memory
item.description: U.S. Marine Corps veteran Rudy Meekins earned four Purple Hearts in the Korean War. One lasting memory is of a Korean boy who traded a handmade flag for a can of beans.

media:content.media:title: Rudy Meekins and a Korean War Memory
media:content.media:description: U.S. Marine Corps veteran Rudy Meekins earned four Purple Hearts in the Korean War. One lasting memory is of a Korean boy who traded a handmade flag for a can of beans.

item.title: The Joke I Told a German POW
item.description: A veteran recalls a brief wartime encounter with a German POW and the joke he told, offering a personal glimpse into military history.

media:content.media:title: The Joke I Told a German POW
media:content.media:description: A veteran recalls a brief wartime encounter with a German POW and the joke he told, offering a personal glimpse into military history.

item.title: Surviving a Viet Cong Firefight
item.description: A firsthand account of surviving a violent Viet Cong firefight, reflecting on combat, service, and the realities faced by soldiers in Vietnam.

media:content.media:title: Surviving a Viet Cong Firefight
media:content.media:description: A firsthand account of surviving a violent Viet Cong firefight, reflecting on combat, service, and the realities faced by soldiers in Vietnam.

item.title: An Incredible Story of Humanity During War
item.description: A wartime story centered on humanity, service, and the human cost of conflict.

media:content.media:title: An Incredible Story of Humanity During War
media:content.media:description: A wartime story centered on humanity, service, and the human cost of conflict.

item.title: Douglas Dillard’s Lifetime of Military Service
item.description: Douglas Dillard joined the U.S. Army at 16 and served through World War II, Korea, and Vietnam. He reflects on courage, sacrifice, and a lifetime of service.

media:content.media:title: Douglas Dillard’s Lifetime of Military Service
media:content.media:description: Douglas Dillard joined the U.S. Army at 16 and served through World War II, Korea, and Vietnam. He reflects on courage, sacrifice, and a lifetime of service.
